channel.title: Sagar Biswas Blog
channel.description: Security awareness posts and engineering reflections by Sagar Biswas.

item.title: Why Quantum Computers Will Break Your Encryption (And Why We're Ready)
item.description: Quantum computers threaten RSA and ECC encryption. NIST's post-quantum standards exist today. Learn what organizations should do now.

item.title: Wi‑Fi Security Alert: MAC Blocking Isn’t Enough — What to Do Instead
item.description: Blocking a device by MAC address is easy to bypass. The safest fix is a Wi‑Fi password change plus tighter router settings.

item.title: Complete, Forever Anonymity Doesn't Exist — Here's What Actually Works
item.description: Nation-state actors can correlate metadata and behavior. VPNs and proxies help, but real anonymity depends on identity separation, fewer actions, and avoiding linking accounts.

item.title: 🧨 Fun Fact: A Cyberattack That Can Start With… a Printer 🖨️
item.description: How a printer can become the easiest entry point into a company network — and how to secure it before attackers do.

item.title: Vibe Coding মানে দ্রুত কাজের আড়ালে ধীরে ধীরে টেক ডেবট জমা করা
item.description: AI দিয়ে দ্রুত ডেলিভারি সম্ভব, কিন্তু ভুল সিদ্ধান্তে তৈরি হয় বাড়তি জটিলতা। কী রাখবেন, কী বাদ দেবেন — এই লেখায় আছে সহজ ব্যাখ্যা।
